name: The Kids in the Hall: Comedy Punks
original_name: The Kids in the Hall: Comedy Punks
overview: Through never before-seen archive material, interviews with celebrities, industry insiders, rabid fans and the Kids In The Hall themselves – this documentary tells the wild story of this cult-famous comedy troupe from the 1980s to the present day.

trailers.title: Hot Docs 2022 Trailer: THE KIDS IN THE HALL: COMEDY PUNKS
